taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Drupal development, PHP, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
skill_match_scores: Drupal development:0.5, PHP:0.5, HTML:0.5, CSS:0.0, JavaScript:0.5
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field, Strong proficiency in PHP, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and MySQL, Experience creating and customizing Drupal modules and themes, Familiarity with Drupal's API, hooks, and command-line tools such as Drush, Understanding of web standards, accessibility, and responsive design principles, Experience with version control systems like Git, Ability to work collaboratively in an Agile development environment, Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail
preferred_quals: 3+ years of professional experience developing with Drupal (versions 8 or higher preferred)
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain Drupal-based websites and applications, Implement custom modules and themes tailored to project requirements, Collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather requirements and translate them into Drupal solutions, Ensure code quality through peer reviews and adherence to best practices, Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to Drupal sites, modules, and integrations, Integrate third-party APIs and services as needed, Keep up-to-date with Drupal core updates and contributed modules to maintain security and performance, Document development processes, configurations, and customizations, Provide support and training to end-users when necessary
job_summary: Astor & Sanders Corporation is an award-winning IT solutions provider headquartered in McLean, VA, seeking a skilled Drupal Developer to join their dynamic team. The role involves designing, developing, and maintaining Drupal-based websites and applications, implementing custom modules and themes, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver effective Drupal solutions.
